hero.guide_prompt: Want to know about the guide?

carousel.description: Immerse yourself in a beautiful, highly customizable interface built for modern audiophiles.

features.title: Features Designed for Audiophiles
features.f1_desc: Bypass standard Android audio limits. Stream pure, unaltered audio directly to your DAC.
features.f2_desc: Your music sets the mood. Our UI adapts to your current album cover.
features.f3_desc: Sing along with precision. Seamless offline and online synced lyrics.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: Welcome to the official documentation for MF Music Player. Here you'll find everything you need to know to get the most out of your audio experience.

s1.desc: MF Music Player is designed to play your local music collection with absolute pristine quality. To start:
s1.l1: Download the latest APK from the home page.
s1.l2: Install the application on your Android device.
s1.l3: Grant storage permissions so the app can scan your local music library.
s1.l4: Wait for the initial scan to complete. High-resolution FLAC and ALAC files are fully supported.

s2.desc: The application interface is fully customizable to your liking. Head to Settings > Appearance to explore:
s2.l1_desc: Decide which screen you want to see first when opening the app.
s2.l2_desc: Choose between Dark mode, Light mode, or automatically follow your System theme.
s2.l3_desc: A sleek Now Playing screen inspired by the aesthetics of Apple Music.
s2.l4_desc: A beautiful alternative layout featuring a circular album art design.
s2.l5_desc: Dynamically extracts colors from the currently playing album art using the Material 3 algorithm and applies them as the app's primary color.
s2.l6_desc: Customize your bottom bar to only show the shortcuts you actually use.
s2.l7_desc: Choose between a detailed list or a visually rich grid layout depending on your preference.

s3.desc1: MF Android bypasses standard Android audio limits to deliver Bit-Perfect playback directly to your DAC.
s3.desc2: Head to Settings > Audio Engine to enable exclusive mode, which locks the sample rate to perfectly match the source file.
s3.attn_desc1: For USB DACs without hardware volume control, we've built in Digital Attenuation to protect your ears. The app smartly remembers your last used volume for each specific USB DAC, allowing you to seamlessly and safely switch between DACs with or without hardware volume controls.
s3.attn_desc2: If your DAC does have its own hardware volume control, you can push the app's digital attenuation slider to 0dB (Max) and disable volume safety to achieve true, unadulterated Bit-Perfect audio.
s3.attn_warn_desc: Always exercise caution when initializing a DAC. Make sure you don't put on your IEMs or headphones before playing the first track to avoid any unexpected bursts of loud volume!

s4.desc1: Manage your music library efficiently. Long press any Album or Artist to reveal quick actions, or dive into their details page.
s4.desc2: Missing or incorrect album covers? Simply select 'Edit Artwork' to search our online databases (like Deezer or Last.fm) and instantly replace them with high-quality images directly saved to your device.

s5.desc1: The app supports standard embedded lyrics and online lyrics providers like Lrclib and Netease.
s5.desc2: To configure providers, go to Settings > Lyrics Provider and prioritize your preferred sources. Synchronized lyrics (.lrc) will automatically scroll along with your music.
s5.desc3: Beyond standard lyrics, MFAndroid boasts powerful plugin support:
s5.l1_desc: Enable on-device machine learning translation to instantly translate foreign lyrics into your native language.
s5.l2_desc: Install the external Romanizer plugin app to seamlessly convert Kanji or Hangul lyrics into readable Romaji/Romaja formats while you listen.

footer.title: Love MF Music Player?
footer.description: MF Music Player is 100% free and will always remain free. However, your support is what keeps the development alive, ensures continuous updates, and helps this project thrive!
